path: Problem: Count how many cells across multiple non-contiguous ranges contain a specified name (as a substring within comma-separated text)
Action: SUMPRODUCT with SEARCH wrapped in ISNUMBER to create a boolean match array, then sum results across each target range

Observation: SEARCH returns a number when the name is found anywhere in the cell text; ISNUMBER converts this to TRUE/FALSE; SUMPRODUCT coerces TRUE/FALSE to 1/0 and sums matches; separate SUMPRODUCT terms are added for each non-contiguous block
